<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>COVID-19 Analytics Dashboard — Lisha Bhowmik</title>
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap');

:root {
  --bg:      #07090f;
  --panel:   #0f1520;
  --card:    #141c2a;
  --border:  #1e2d42;
  --teal:    #00d4b1;
  --red:     #ff5266;
  --amber:   #ffb340;
  --blue:    #5ba8ff;
  --purple:  #a78bfa;
  --text:    #d4dce8;
  --muted:   #56697f;
  --faint:   #1a2535;
}

* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

body {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 300;
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text);
  line-height: 1.65;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* ── noise + scanline overlay ── */
body::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed; inset: 0;
  background:
    repeating-linear-gradient(
      0deg,
      rgba(0,0,0,.03) 0px,
      rgba(0,0,0,.03) 1px,
      transparent 1px,
      transparent 3px
    );
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 0;
}

.wrap {
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 2rem 8rem;
}

/* ══════════════════════
   HERO
══════════════════════ */
.hero {
  padding: 5.5rem 0 4rem;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
  align-items: end;
  gap: 2rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.hero-left { }

.eyebrow {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .68rem;
  letter-spacing: .18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--teal);
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .7rem;
}
.eyebrow::before {
  content: '';
  display: inline-block;
  width: 28px; height: 1px;
  background: var(--teal);
}

.hero h1 {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 5.5vw, 4.4rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.05;
  color: #fff;
  letter-spacing: -.03em;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}
.hero h1 span { color: var(--teal); }

.hero-desc {
  font-size: .95rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  max-width: 500px;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

.hero-right {
  text-align: right;
}
.hero-author {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #fff;
  margin-bottom: .3rem;
}
.hero-meta {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .68rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  letter-spacing: .06em;
  line-height: 1.8;
}

/* ══════════════════════
   GLOBAL KPI BAR
══════════════════════ */
.kpi-bar {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  margin: 2.8rem 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--faint);
  gap: 1px;
}
.kpi-cell {
  background: var(--card);
  padding: 1.6rem 1.4rem;
  text-align: center;
}
.kpi-num {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -.04em;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: .45rem;
}
.kpi-lbl {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .62rem;
  letter-spacing: .12em;
  color: var(--muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.c-teal  { color: var(--teal);   }
.c-red   { color: var(--red);    }
.c-amber { color: var(--amber);  }
.c-blue  { color: var(--blue);   }

/* ══════════════════════
   SECTION HEADING
══════════════════════ */
.section {
  margin-top: 4.5rem;
}
.sec-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--faint);
}
.sec-index {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .65rem;
  color: var(--teal);
  letter-spacing: .14em;
  opacity: .55;
}
.sec-title {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
}
.sec-body {
  font-size: .88rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
  max-width: 680px;
}

/* ══════════════════════
   CHART CARD
══════════════════════ */
.chart-card {
  background: var(--card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  transition: border-color .2s;
}
.chart-card:hover { border-color: rgba(0,212,177,.3); }

.chart-meta {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 1.3rem 1.5rem .9rem;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.chart-label { }
.chart-title {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: .9rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #e8edf3;
  letter-spacing: -.01em;
  margin-bottom: .2rem;
}
.chart-caption {
  font-size: .76rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.55;
  max-width: 480px;
}
.badge {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .6rem;
  letter-spacing: .1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: .2rem .65rem;
  border-radius: 2px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.badge-teal  { color: var(--teal);  background: rgba(0,212,177,.1);  border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,177,.25); }
.badge-red   { color: var(--red);   background: rgba(255,82,102,.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,82,102,.25); }
.badge-amber { color: var(--amber); background: rgba(255,179,64,.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,179,64,.25); }
.badge-blue  { color: var(--blue);  background: rgba(91,168,255,.1); border: 1px solid rgba(91,168,255,.25); }
.badge-purple{ color: var(--purple);background: rgba(167,139,250,.1);border: 1px solid rgba(167,139,250,.25); }

.chart-sep {
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--faint);
  margin: 0;
}
.chart-img {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  background: #0b1119;
}

/* 2-col layout */
.grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
}

/* ══════════════════════
   NOTEBOOK STRUCTURE
══════════════════════ */
.notebook-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(230px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
}
.nb-cell {
  background: var(--card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 1.2rem 1.3rem;
  transition: border-color .2s;
}
.nb-cell:hover { border-color: rgba(0,212,177,.3); }
.nb-num {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .62rem;
  color: var(--teal);
  letter-spacing: .12em;
  margin-bottom: .5rem;
}
.nb-title {
  font-size: .82rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #d4dce8;
  margin-bottom: .3rem;
}
.nb-desc {
  font-size: .76rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.55;
}

/* ══════════════════════
   DATA TABLES
══════════════════════ */
.data-table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
}
table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: .8rem;
}
thead tr {
  background: var(--faint);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
thead th {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .65rem;
  letter-spacing: .1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--teal);
  padding: .75rem 1rem;
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: 400;
}
tbody tr {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--faint);
  background: var(--card);
}
tbody tr:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
tbody td {
  padding: .65rem 1rem;
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .74rem;
}
.td-country { color: #e8edf3; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; }
.td-num { color: var(--teal); }
.td-red { color: var(--red); }
.td-amber { color: var(--amber); }

/* ══════════════════════
   STACK GRID
══════════════════════ */
.stack-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem;
}
.stack-pill {
  background: var(--card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 5px;
  padding: .9rem 1rem;
  transition: border-color .2s;
}
.stack-pill:hover { border-color: rgba(0,212,177,.35); }
.stack-name {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .75rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--teal);
  letter-spacing: .05em;
  margin-bottom: .2rem;
}
.stack-role {
  font-size: .73rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.4;
}

/* ══════════════════════
   SETUP BLOCKS
══════════════════════ */
.setup-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.code-box {
  background: #060d16;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.code-box.full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
.code-top {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;
  padding: .5rem .9rem;
  background: var(--faint);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.code-dot { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; }
.d-r { background: #ff5f57; }
.d-y { background: #febc2e; }
.d-g { background: #28c840; }
.code-file {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .62rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-left: .4rem;
  letter-spacing: .06em;
}
pre {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .76rem;
  line-height: 1.85;
  color: var(--text);
  padding: 1.1rem 1.3rem;
  overflow-x: auto;
}
.kw  { color: var(--teal); }
.str { color: var(--amber); }
.cm  { color: var(--muted); opacity: .55; }

/* ══════════════════════
   FOOTER
══════════════════════ */
.footer {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin-top: 5rem;
  padding-top: 2.5rem;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.footer-name {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
}
.footer-note {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .65rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  letter-spacing: .05em;
}

@media(max-width:680px){
  .hero            { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero-right      { text-align: left; }
  .kpi-bar         { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); }
  .grid-2          { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .setup-grid      { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .code-box.full   { grid-column: auto; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="wrap">

<!-- ══ HERO ══ -->
<header class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="eyebrow">Epidemiology · Python · Data Viz</div>
    <h1>COVID-19<br><span>Analytics</span><br>Dashboard</h1>
    <p class="hero-desc">A data analytics project exploring global pandemic metrics — confirmed cases, fatality rates, recovery trends, and week-over-week hotspot emergence across 90 days of simulated mid-2020 data.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <div class="hero-author">Lisha Bhowmik</div>
    <div class="hero-meta">
      Python · SQL · Power BI<br>
      Tableau · Looker Studio<br>
      Apr – Jun 2020 · 10 countries · 6 WHO regions
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- ══ KPI BAR ══ -->
<div class="kpi-bar">
  <div class="kpi-cell">
    <div class="kpi-num c-teal">16.48M</div>
    <div class="kpi-lbl">Total Confirmed</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-cell">
    <div class="kpi-num c-red">654,036</div>
    <div class="kpi-lbl">Total Deaths</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-cell">
    <div class="kpi-num c-teal">9.47M</div>
    <div class="kpi-lbl">Total Recovered</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-cell">
    <div class="kpi-num c-amber">6.36M</div>
    <div class="kpi-lbl">Active Cases</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ 01 · PROJECT OVERVIEW ══ -->
<section class="section">
  <div class="sec-header">
    <span class="sec-index">01 ──</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Notebook Structure</h2>
  </div>
  <p class="sec-body">The notebook walks through a complete analytics pipeline — library setup, dataset construction, cleaning, and eight distinct visualisations saved to <code>outputs/</code>.</p>

  <div class="notebook-grid">
    <div class="nb-cell">
      <div class="nb-num">CELL 01</div>
      <div class="nb-title">Install Libraries</div>
      <div class="nb-desc">pandas · numpy · matplotlib · seaborn via pip</div>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-cell">
      <div class="nb-num">CELL 02</div>
      <div class="nb-title">Import Libraries</div>
      <div class="nb-desc">Imports + <code>outputs/</code> directory creation + warning suppression</div>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-cell">
      <div class="nb-num">CELL 03</div>
      <div class="nb-title">Create Dataset</div>
      <div class="nb-desc">Builds 4 analytical DataFrames: Top-10 countries, WHO regions, 90-day time-series, WoW growth</div>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-cell">
      <div class="nb-num">CELL 04</div>
      <div class="nb-title">Data Cleaning</div>
      <div class="nb-desc">Deduplication · null check · date parsing · global KPI constants</div>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-cell">
      <div class="nb-num">CELLS 05–12</div>
      <div class="nb-title">Visualisations</div>
      <div class="nb-desc">Eight dark-themed charts saved as PNG to <code>outputs/</code></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ 02 · DATASETS ══ -->
<section class="section">
  <div class="sec-header">
    <span class="sec-index">02 ──</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Datasets</h2>
  </div>
  <p class="sec-body">All four DataFrames are constructed from scratch using NumPy (<code>seed=42</code>) to reproduce real-world mid-2020 figures deterministically.</p>

  <!-- Top-10 table -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <div class="badge badge-teal" style="display:inline-flex;margin-bottom:.75rem;">df_top10 — 10 rows × 7 cols</div>
  </div>
  <div class="data-table-wrap">
    <table>
      <thead><tr>
        <th>Country</th><th>Confirmed</th><th>Deaths</th><th>Recovered</th><th>Active</th><th>CFR %</th><th>Recovery %</th>
      </tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td class="td-country">United States</td><td class="td-num">4,200,000</td><td class="td-red">145,000</td><td class="td-num">1,900,000</td><td class="td-amber">2,155,000</td><td class="td-red">3.45</td><td class="td-num">45.24</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Brazil</td><td class="td-num">2,500,000</td><td class="td-red">90,000</td><td class="td-num">1,800,000</td><td class="td-amber">610,000</td><td class="td-red">3.60</td><td class="td-num">72.00</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">India</td><td class="td-num">1,500,000</td><td class="td-red">34,000</td><td class="td-num">980,000</td><td class="td-amber">486,000</td><td class="td-red">2.27</td><td class="td-num">65.33</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Russia</td><td class="td-num">820,000</td><td class="td-red">13,000</td><td class="td-num">620,000</td><td class="td-amber">187,000</td><td class="td-red">1.59</td><td class="td-num">75.61</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">South Africa</td><td class="td-num">450,000</td><td class="td-red">7,000</td><td class="td-num">330,000</td><td class="td-amber">113,000</td><td class="td-red">1.56</td><td class="td-num">73.33</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Mexico</td><td class="td-num">395,000</td><td class="td-red">44,000</td><td class="td-num">290,000</td><td class="td-amber">61,000</td><td class="td-red">11.14</td><td class="td-num">73.42</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Peru</td><td class="td-num">370,000</td><td class="td-red">17,000</td><td class="td-num">240,000</td><td class="td-amber">113,000</td><td class="td-red">4.59</td><td class="td-num">64.86</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Chile</td><td class="td-num">340,000</td><td class="td-red">9,000</td><td class="td-num">310,000</td><td class="td-amber">21,000</td><td class="td-red">2.65</td><td class="td-num">91.18</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">United Kingdom</td><td class="td-num">300,000</td><td class="td-red">46,000</td><td class="td-num">4,000</td><td class="td-amber">250,000</td><td class="td-red">15.33</td><td class="td-num">1.33</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Iran</td><td class="td-num">280,000</td><td class="td-red">14,800</td><td class="td-num">232,000</td><td class="td-amber">33,200</td><td class="td-red">5.29</td><td class="td-num">82.86</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Regional table -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;margin-top:1.5rem;">
    <div class="badge badge-blue" style="display:inline-flex;margin-bottom:.75rem;">df_region — 6 rows × 4 cols</div>
  </div>
  <div class="data-table-wrap" style="margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
    <table>
      <thead><tr><th>WHO Region</th><th>Confirmed</th><th>Deaths</th><th>Recovered</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Americas</td><td class="td-num">8,700,000</td><td class="td-red">350,000</td><td class="td-num">5,200,000</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Europe</td><td class="td-num">3,300,000</td><td class="td-red">210,000</td><td class="td-num">1,900,000</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">South-East Asia</td><td class="td-num">1,900,000</td><td class="td-red">40,000</td><td class="td-num">1,300,000</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Eastern Mediterranean</td><td class="td-num">1,400,000</td><td class="td-red">35,000</td><td class="td-num">1,100,000</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Africa</td><td class="td-num">870,000</td><td class="td-red">16,000</td><td class="td-num">650,000</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="td-country">Western Pacific</td><td class="td-num">310,000</td><td class="td-red">7,000</td><td class="td-num">270,000</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- df_ts + df_wow descriptors -->
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div class="nb-cell">
      <div class="nb-num">df_ts — 90 rows × 5 cols</div>
      <div class="nb-title">90-Day Time Series</div>
      <div class="nb-desc">Daily global case counts from <strong>2020-04-01 → 2020-06-29</strong>. Built via <code>np.linspace</code> base + cumulative random-walk noise (seed 42). Fields: Date, Confirmed, Deaths, Recovered, Active.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-cell">
      <div class="nb-num">df_wow — 10 rows × 2 cols</div>
      <div class="nb-title">Week-over-Week Growth</div>
      <div class="nb-desc">10 fastest-accelerating outbreak countries. Papua New Guinea 225% · Gambia 190% · Bahamas 120% · Zimbabwe 55% · Libya 52% · Ethiopia 50% · Botswana 48% · Lesotho 46% · Suriname 44% · Costa Rica 40%.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ 03 · VISUALISATIONS ══ -->
<section class="section">
  <div class="sec-header">
    <span class="sec-index">03 ──</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Visualisations</h2>
  </div>
  <p class="sec-body">Eight charts rendered in a consistent dark theme (bg <code>#0D1117</code>, panel <code>#161B22</code>, accent teal <code>#20B2AA</code>) and exported to <code>outputs/</code> at 150 dpi.</p>

  <!-- Chart 01: KPI cards -->
  <div class="chart-card">
    <div class="chart-meta">
      <div class="chart-label">
        <div class="chart-title">01 — Global KPI Summary Cards</div>
        <div class="chart-caption">Four-panel summary card showing total confirmed, deaths, recovered and active cases at a glance.</div>
      </div>
      <span class="badge badge-teal">Overview</span>
    </div>
    <div class="chart-sep"></div>
    <img class="chart-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="KPI Cards"/>
  </div>

  <!-- Charts 02 + 03 side by side -->
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div class="chart-card">
      <div class="chart-meta">
        <div class="chart-label">
          <div class="chart-title">02 — Top 10 Countries · Confirmed</div>
          <div class="chart-caption">Horizontal bar ranked by confirmed cases. US leads at 4.2M.</div>
        </div>
        <span class="badge badge-teal">Cases</span>
      </div>
      <div class="chart-sep"></div>
      <img class="chart-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Top 10 confirmed"/>
    </div>
    <div class="chart-card">
      <div class="chart-meta">
        <div class="chart-label">
          <div class="chart-title">03 — Case Fatality Rate</div>
          <div class="chart-caption">CFR % colour-coded by severity. UK highest at 15.33%, Russia lowest at 1.59%.</div>
        </div>
        <span class="badge badge-red">CFR</span>
      </div>
      <div class="chart-sep"></div>
      <img class="chart-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="CFR"/>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Charts 04 + 05 side by side -->
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div class="chart-card">
      <div class="chart-meta">
        <div class="chart-label">
          <div class="chart-title">04 — Recovery Rate</div>
          <div class="chart-caption">Chile leads at 91.2%; UK trails at just 1.3% due to limited recovery reporting.</div>
        </div>
        <span class="badge badge-teal">Recovery</span>
      </div>
      <div class="chart-sep"></div>
      <img class="chart-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Recovery rate"/>
    </div>
    <div class="chart-card">
      <div class="chart-meta">
        <div class="chart-label">
          <div class="chart-title">05 — Confirmed by WHO Region</div>
          <div class="chart-caption">Americas account for 53% of global confirmed cases; Western Pacific least affected.</div>
        </div>
        <span class="badge badge-blue">Regional</span>
      </div>
      <div class="chart-sep"></div>
      <img class="chart-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Regional pie"/>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Chart 06: Time series full-width -->
  <div class="chart-card">
    <div class="chart-meta">
      <div class="chart-label">
        <div class="chart-title">06 — 90-Day Global Trend (Apr – Jun 2020)</div>
        <div class="chart-caption">Daily trajectory of confirmed, recovered, active and death counts over 90 days. Built from a linear base (500K → 16.48M) plus cumulative Gaussian noise.</div>
      </div>
      <span class="badge badge-teal">Time Series</span>
    </div>
    <div class="chart-sep"></div>
    <img class="chart-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Time series"/>
  </div>

  <!-- Charts 07 + 08 side by side -->
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div class="chart-card">
      <div class="chart-meta">
        <div class="chart-label">
          <div class="chart-title">07 — Week-over-Week Growth</div>
          <div class="chart-caption">Emerging hotspots. Papua New Guinea surged 225% WoW — highest in the dataset.</div>
        </div>
        <span class="badge badge-red">WoW</span>
      </div>
      <div class="chart-sep"></div>
      <img class="chart-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="WoW growth"/>
    </div>
    <div class="chart-card">
      <div class="chart-meta">
        <div class="chart-label">
          <div class="chart-title">08 — Active vs Recovered · Stacked</div>
          <div class="chart-caption">Outbreak burden per country — active cases stacked on recovered to show total caseload composition.</div>
        </div>
        <span class="badge badge-amber">Split</span>
      </div>
      <div class="chart-sep"></div>
      <img class="chart-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Active vs recovered"/>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ 04 · TECH STACK ══ -->
<section class="section">
  <div class="sec-header">
    <span class="sec-index">04 ──</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Tech Stack</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="stack-grid">
    <div class="stack-pill"><div class="stack-name">Python 3</div><div class="stack-role">Core runtime (Anaconda env)</div></div>
    <div class="stack-pill"><div class="stack-name">Pandas 2.2</div><div class="stack-role">DataFrame construction & cleaning</div></div>
    <div class="stack-pill"><div class="stack-name">NumPy 2.1</div><div class="stack-role">Numerical simulation (seed 42)</div></div>
    <div class="stack-pill"><div class="stack-name">Matplotlib 3.10</div><div class="stack-role">Dark-theme chart generation</div></div>
    <div class="stack-pill"><div class="stack-name">Seaborn 0.13</div><div class="stack-role">coolwarm palettes & styling</div></div>
    <div class="stack-pill"><div class="stack-name">SQL</div><div class="stack-role">Querying & aggregation</div></div>
    <div class="stack-pill"><div class="stack-name">Power BI</div><div class="stack-role">Interactive dashboards</div></div>
    <div class="stack-pill"><div class="stack-name">Tableau</div><div class="stack-role">Visual analytics</div></div>
    <div class="stack-pill"><div class="stack-name">Looker Studio</div><div class="stack-role">Web-based reporting</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ 05 · SETUP ══ -->
<section class="section">
  <div class="sec-header">
    <span class="sec-index">05 ──</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Setup &amp; Usage</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="setup-grid">
    <div class="code-box">
      <div class="code-top">
        <span class="code-dot d-r"></span>
        <span class="code-dot d-y"></span>
        <span class="code-dot d-g"></span>
        <span class="code-file">terminal — pip</span>
      </div>
      <pre><span class="cm"># install dependencies</span>
<span class="kw">pip install</span> pandas numpy \
            matplotlib seaborn</pre>
    </div>
    <div class="code-box">
      <div class="code-top">
        <span class="code-dot d-r"></span>
        <span class="code-dot d-y"></span>
        <span class="code-dot d-g"></span>
        <span class="code-file">terminal — conda</span>
      </div>
      <pre><span class="cm"># or via conda</span>
<span class="kw">conda install</span> pandas numpy \
              matplotlib seaborn</pre>
    </div>
    <div class="code-box full">
      <div class="code-top">
        <span class="code-dot d-r"></span>
        <span class="code-dot d-y"></span>
        <span class="code-dot d-g"></span>
        <span class="code-file">terminal — run notebook</span>
      </div>
      <pre><span class="cm"># launch Jupyter and open the notebook</span>
<span class="kw">jupyter notebook</span> <span class="str">COVID19_Analytics_Dashboard.ipynb</span>

<span class="cm"># charts are auto-saved to outputs/</span>
<span class="cm"># 01_kpi_cards.png  02_top10_confirmed.png  03_cfr_by_country.png</span>
<span class="cm"># 04_recovery_rate.png  05_regional_pie.png  06_timeseries.png</span>
<span class="cm"># 07_wow_growth.png  08_active_vs_recovered.png</span></pre>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ FOOTER ══ -->
<footer class="footer">
  <div class="footer-name">Lisha Bhowmik</div>
  <div class="footer-note">⚠ All data is simulated for portfolio &amp; educational purposes — figures modelled on mid-2020 pandemic records</div>
</footer>

</div>
</body>
</html>
